phoneticUs: a瑟so蕣pr蓹藞ter蓹n蓱藧l; a瑟so蕣pr蓹藞ter蓹n蓴l
meaning: n.[鑽痌寮備笝(鍘荤敳)鑲句笂鑵虹礌
examples: The acute toxicity of isoproterenol is much less than that of epinephrine.
The heart rates of pigs in both groups were observed after isoproterenol (ISO) being injected through femoral vein.
We conducted base tilt table test (BTTT) in all patients and additional isoproterenol tilt table test (ITTT) in 18 patients.
